use_cases: Displaying product features with animated shader backgrounds on landing pages
Showcasing SaaS benefits with premium glass-morphism card effects
Creating interactive feature grids with WebGL shader animations
Building visually striking feature sections for marketing websites
Enhancing developer tools or fintech product pages with modern card layouts
ai_summary: A feature card component using WebGL shaders (Warp effect from paper-design/shaders-react) with glass-morphism styling and animated gradient backgrounds. Renders multiple feature items with icons, titles, and descriptions in a visually striking layout. Built with React and Tailwind CSS for modern web applications, featuring smooth shader-based animations and hover effects.
